'''mothahaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:xanthodontous|xanthodontous]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-th-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xanthodontous|xanthodontous]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| mothahaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mothahithi|mothahithi]] || [[word:mothahiji|mothahiji]] || [[word:mothahishi|mothahishi]] || [[word:mothahiki|mothahiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:mothahuthuthu|mothahuthuthu]] || [[word:mothahujuju|mothahujuju]] || [[word:mothahushushu|mothahushushu]] || [[word:mothahukuku|mothahukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:mothahuthu|mothahuthu]] || [[word:mothahuju|mothahuju]] || [[word:mothahushu|mothahushu]] || [[word:mothahuku|mothahuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:mothahufthuf|mothahufthuf]] || [[word:mothahufjuf|mothahufjuf]] || [[word:mothahufshuf|mothahufshuf]] || [[word:mothahufkuf|mothahufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mothahethe|mothahethe]] || [[word:mothaheje|mothaheje]] || [[word:mothaheshe|mothaheshe]] || [[word:mothaheke|mothaheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mothahothotho|mothahothotho]] || [[word:mothahojojo|mothahojojo]] || [[word:mothahoshosho|mothahoshosho]] || [[word:mothahokoko|mothahokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mothahotho|mothahotho]] || [[word:mothahojo|mothahojo]] || [[word:mothahosho|mothahosho]] || [[word:mothahoko|mothahoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mothahofthof|mothahofthof]] || [[word:mothahofjof|mothahofjof]] || [[word:mothahofshof|mothahofshof]] || [[word:mothahofkof|mothahofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:mothahĂŻfthĂŻf|mothahĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:mothahĂŻfjĂŻf|mothahĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:mothahĂŻfshĂŻf|mothahĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:mothahĂŻfkĂŻf|mothahĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:mothahĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|mothahĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:mothahĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|mothahĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:mothahĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|mothahĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:mothahĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|mothahĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:mothahĂŻfthĂŻf|mothahĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:mothahĂŻfjĂŻf|mothahĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:mothahĂŻfshĂŻf|mothahĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:mothahĂŻfkĂŻf|mothahĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:mothahĂŻfthĂŻf|mothahĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:mothahĂŻfjĂŻf|mothahĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:mothahĂŻfshĂŻf|mothahĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:mothahĂŻfkĂŻf|mothahĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mothahĂŠthĂŠ|mothahĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:mothahĂŠjĂŠ|mothahĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:mothahĂŠshĂŠ|mothahĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:mothahĂŠkĂŠ|mothahĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mothahathatha|mothahathatha]] || [[word:mothahajaja|mothahajaja]] || [[word:mothahashasha|mothahashasha]] || [[word:mothahakaka|mothahakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mothahatha|mothahatha]] || [[word:mothahaja|mothahaja]] || [[word:mothahasha|mothahasha]] || [[word:mothahaka|mothahaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mothahafthaf|mothahafthaf]] || [[word:mothahafjaf|mothahafjaf]] || [[word:mothahafshaf|mothahafshaf]] || [[word:mothahafkaf|mothahafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:mothahasha|mothahasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:mothahshĂ«asha|mothahshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mothahroasha|mothahroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mothahmuasha|mothahmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:mothahyaasha|mothahyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomothahnkshĂ«asha|gomothahnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomothahnkroasha|gomothahnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomothahnkmuasha|gomothahnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomothahnkyaasha|gomothahnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:mothathahasha|mothathahasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mothathahshĂ«asha|mothathahshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mothathahroasha|mothathahroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mothathahmuasha|mothathahmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mothathahyaasha|mothathahyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomothathahnkshĂ«asha|gomothathahnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomothathahnkroasha|gomothathahnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomothathahnkmuasha|gomothathahnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomothathahnkyaasha|gomothathahnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:methĂŠhasha|methĂŠhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:methĂŠhshĂ«asha|methĂŠhshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:methĂŠhroasha|methĂŠhroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:methĂŠhmuasha|methĂŠhmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:methĂŠhyaasha|methĂŠhyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomethĂŠhnkshĂ«asha|gomethĂŠhnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomethĂŠhnkroasha|gomethĂŠhnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomethĂŠhnkmuasha|gomethĂŠhnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomethĂŠhnkyaasha|gomethĂŠhnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:mothfahasha|mothfahasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mothfahshĂ«asha|mothfahshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mothfahroasha|mothfahroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mothfahmuasha|mothfahmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mothfahyaasha|mothfahyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomothfahnkshĂ«asha|gomothfahnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomothfahnkroasha|gomothfahnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomothfahnkmuasha|gomothfahnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomothfahnkyaasha|gomothfahnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
